description.ko: 사이버펑크 도시의 내부를 무드 있고 대기감 있게 묘사하며, 젖은 도시 표면에 반사되는 네온 데이터 스트림을 강조합니다.
description.en: A moody, atmospheric view of a cyberpunk city's interior, emphasizing the reflection of neon data streams on wet urban surfaces.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Rain-Slicked Arteries.' A perspective looking down a narrow cyberpunk alleyway where towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by low-hanging sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta data streams. A torrential holographic downpour creates #00FFFF cyan pixel-ripples on wet metallic surfaces, reflecting the city's neon soul. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering holographic advertisements, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, capturing the urban romanticism of a neon-soaked future.
